历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Central South University in Yunnan Province's science/physics category were approximately 5458, 5400, 4336, 7649, and 5120 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, the ranking moved forward to 4336 (best in recent years), dropped sharply to 7649 in 2024 (a gap year), and rebounded to 5120 in 2025. The average ranking over the past 5 years is about 5593, with a standard deviation of about 1185, indicating clear size-year fluctuations in Yunnan science students. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5120. Enrollment plans for Central South University in Yunnan's science/physics category: 159 in 2021, 160 in 2022, 160 in 2023, 160 in 2024, 153 in 2025, and 150 in 2026 (from enrollment plan documents). In 2026, there is a reduction of 3 students (-2.0%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight reductions, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2023 were 23rd, 24th in 2024, and 27th in 2025-2026, showing a slight decline but still firmly in the top 30 nationally, belonging to the top-tier universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Central South University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. In 2024, the university showed signs of admission gaps in some provinces (medium concern), and in 2025, individual majors in Chongqing had admission scores lower than the national special line (low concern). Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 85th, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Central South University has 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Basic Medicine A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing are top A+ disciplines, while Materials Science, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are strong disciplines, indicating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended). Central South University has A- or above discipline support in these areas, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories about 285,700). Based on recent subject distribution estimates, the number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 223,000, an increase of about 28.4% from 173,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition within the province. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, and its enrollment plan in Yunnan accounts for about 2.2%-2.3% of total enrollment (2024-2025), which is a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment. The geographical distance between Hunan and Yunnan is moderate, with no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5120, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (150 vs 153), the significant increase of about 28% in Yunnan's physics category candidate pool, and the somewhat negative university reputation, it is expected that competition for Central South University in Yunnan's science/physics category will slightly intensify in 2026. Combining the superimposed effects of candidate pool expansion and enrollment reduction, a slight upward adjustment is given. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5100, with a fluctuation range of 4600-5600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5100, range 4600-5600. For rankings in the 4600-4900 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors with a sprint for Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year, Stomatology 5+3 require rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range); for rankings in the 4900-5300 range, focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc., popular engineering fields); for rankings in the 5300-5600 range, it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also aiming for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Central South University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in metallurgy, materials, transportation, and clinical medicine. Candidates can reasonably combine strategies of sprint, stable, and safety choices based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Central South University in Yunnan Province's liberal arts/history category were approximately 911th → 925th → 912th → 750th → 1137th. Rankings were stable between 910–925 from 2021 to 2023, moved forward to 750th in 2024 (best in recent years), and significantly moved back to 1137th in 2025 (worst in recent years). The 5-year average is about 927th, with a standard deviation of about 131. The 2025 ranking significantly deviates from the average, being a historical high; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history in Yunnan: 15 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 20 in 2025, and 19 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 1 student (-5.0%), a slight decrease after several years of stability.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has been stable at 23rd–27th in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. Although liberal arts are not its traditional strength, the overall level of the university still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Central South University's reputation is slightly negative (due to the former president being investigated), and its Douyin popularity is average (ranked 85th). In 2024, the university showed signs of admission gaps in some provinces (medium attention), and in 2025, individual majors in Chongqing had abnormal admissions (low attention). Overall, the impact of public opinion on application popularity is limited; Central South University's A- and above disciplines related to liberal arts include: Marxist Theory A-, Management Science and Engineering A-. Additionally, liberal arts admission majors such as Law, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, and Foreign Languages and Literature, although not rated as A-class disciplines, still have certain competitiveness relying on the university's comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is hot (recommended), Finance/Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see. Central South University's liberal arts admission majors (Law, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature) are all liberal arts directions with high social attention. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is about 377,900. Based on recent subject ratio estimates, history category candidates are about 155,000, an increase of about 38% compared to 112,000 in 2025. The significant growth in candidate numbers will intensify competition in liberal arts within the province; Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. Its liberal arts admissions in Yunnan account for a low proportion of total admissions (about 0.6%–0.9%), making it a small-scale province in out-of-province admissions, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1137th, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (19 vs 20), the significant increase of about 38% in the number of history category candidates in Yunnan, and the slightly negative university reputation, it is expected that competition for Central South University in Yunnan's liberal arts/history category will slightly intensify in 2026. Combined with the effect of the increase in candidate numbers, a slight upward adjustment is given. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1123rd, with a fluctuation range of 963–1283.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1123rd, range 963–1283. Rankings in the 963–1050 range can aim for Tier 1 majors (Law, Finance); rankings in the 1050–1200 range should focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Language and Literature); rankings in the 1200–1283 range are advised to use Tier 3 majors (Foreign Languages and Literature) as a safety. Central South University has few liberal arts admission majors (only 4), so candidates should choose based on personal interests and career plans. Law and Finance are relatively popular directions.
